query:
INSERT INTO spare_parts (name, sku, category, brand, price, stock, lowStockThreshold, compatibleMakes, compatibleModels, description, warranty, featured, active) VALUES
('Premium Oil Filter', 'ENG-OIL-001', 'engine', 'Bosch', '12.99', 150, 10, '["Toyota","Honda","BMW","Audi"]', '["Camry","Civic","3 Series","A4"]', 'High-performance oil filter with advanced filtration technology. Removes 99.9% of contaminants to keep your engine running clean.', '1 Year', 1, 1),
('Air Filter - High Performance', 'ENG-AIR-002', 'engine', 'K&N', '45.99', 80, 8, '["Toyota","Honda","Ford","Chevrolet"]', '["Camry","Civic","F-150","Silverado"]', 'K&N high-flow air filter increases horsepower and acceleration while providing excellent filtration. Washable and reusable.', '1 Million Mile', 1, 1),
('Spark Plug Set (4-pack)', 'ENG-SPK-003', 'engine', 'NGK', '38.99', 200, 20, '["Toyota","Honda","BMW","Mercedes-Benz"]', '["Camry","Civic","3 Series","C-Class"]', 'NGK iridium spark plugs for superior ignitability and long service life. Reduces misfires and improves fuel efficiency.', '2 Years', 0, 1),
('Front Brake Pads', 'BRK-PAD-001', 'brakes', 'Brembo', '65.99', 120, 10, '["BMW","Audi","Mercedes-Benz","Porsche"]', '["5 Series","A4","C-Class","Cayenne"]', 'Brembo premium front brake pads with superior stopping power and minimal brake dust. OEM quality replacement.', '2 Years', 1, 1),
('Rear Brake Discs (Pair)', 'BRK-DSC-002', 'brakes', 'Brembo', '89.99', 60, 5, '["BMW","Audi","Mercedes-Benz"]', '["5 Series","A4","E-Class"]', 'Brembo slotted and drilled rear brake discs for improved heat dissipation and wet weather performance.', '2 Years', 0, 1),
('Brake Fluid DOT 4', 'BRK-FLD-003', 'brakes', 'ATE', '14.99', 300, 30, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'ATE DOT 4 brake fluid with high boiling point for reliable braking performance in all conditions. 500ml bottle.', '1 Year', 0, 1),
('Front Shock Absorber (Pair)', 'SUS-SHK-001', 'suspension', 'KYB', '145.99', 40, 4, '["Toyota","Honda","Ford"]', '["Camry","Accord","F-150"]', 'KYB Excel-G front shock absorbers restore original handling and control. Direct OEM replacement for easy installation.', '2 Years', 1, 1),
('Coil Spring Set', 'SUS-SPR-002', 'suspension', 'Eibach', '220.00', 25, 3, '["BMW","Audi","Mercedes-Benz"]', '["3 Series","A4","C-Class"]', 'Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs reduce ride height by 25-35mm for improved handling and sporty appearance.', '3 Years', 0, 1),
('Sway Bar Link Kit', 'SUS-SWY-003', 'suspension', 'Moog', '35.99', 90, 8, '["Toyota","Honda","Ford","Chevrolet"]', '["Camry","Civic","F-150","Silverado"]', 'Moog heavy-duty sway bar link kit with greaseable ball joints for extended service life.', '1 Year', 0, 1),
('Car Battery 12V 70Ah', 'ELC-BAT-001', 'electrical', 'Varta', '129.99', 50, 5, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'Varta Silver Dynamic AGM battery with superior cold-start performance. Ideal for vehicles with start-stop technology.', '4 Years', 1, 1),
('Alternator', 'ELC-ALT-002', 'electrical', 'Bosch', '185.00', 30, 3, '["Toyota","Honda","BMW"]', '["Camry","Accord","3 Series"]', 'Remanufactured Bosch alternator with new bearings and brushes. Tested to OEM specifications.', '2 Years', 0, 1),
('LED Headlight Bulb Set H7', 'LGT-LED-001', 'lighting', 'Philips', '79.99', 100, 10, '["BMW","Audi","Mercedes-Benz","Volkswagen"]', '["5 Series","A4","C-Class","Golf"]', 'Philips Ultinon Pro LED headlight bulbs. 200% more brightness than standard halogen. 6000K cool white light.', '2 Years', 1, 1),
('Fog Light Bulb H11', 'LGT-FOG-002', 'lighting', 'Osram', '19.99', 200, 20, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'Osram Night Breaker laser fog light bulbs. Up to 150% more light on the road. Easy plug-and-play installation.', '1 Year', 0, 1),
('Engine Oil 5W-30 5L', 'FLT-OIL-001', 'filters', 'Castrol', '34.99', 250, 25, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'Castrol EDGE 5W-30 fully synthetic engine oil with Fluid TITANIUM technology. Superior protection under pressure.', 'N/A', 1, 1),
('Cabin Air Filter', 'FLT-CAB-002', 'filters', 'Mann-Filter', '22.99', 180, 15, '["Toyota","Honda","BMW","Audi"]', '["Camry","Civic","3 Series","A4"]', 'Mann-Filter premium cabin air filter removes pollen, dust, and harmful particles. Activated carbon version available.', '1 Year', 0, 1),
('All-Season Tyre 225/45R17', 'TYR-ALL-001', 'tyres', 'Michelin', '149.99', 40, 4, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'Michelin Pilot Sport 4 all-season tyre. Exceptional grip in wet and dry conditions. Long tread life.', '5 Years', 1, 1),
('Windshield Wiper Blades (Pair)', 'ACC-WPR-001', 'accessories', 'Bosch', '29.99', 150, 15, '["Universal"]', '["Universal"]', 'Bosch Aerotwin flat wiper blades with aerodynamic design for streak-free wiping in all weather conditions.', '1 Year', 0, 1),
('Timing Belt Kit', 'ENG-TBK-004', 'engine', 'Gates', '95.00', 35, 4, '["Toyota","Honda","Ford"]', '["Camry","Accord","Focus"]', 'Gates complete timing belt kit including belt, tensioner, and idler pulleys. Prevents costly engine damage.', '2 Years', 0, 1);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Jy5U1PvD6gwa7y.root --database UzJchvb2hpAkPB2P8vYivv --execute
